Review: The food is delicious the staff are really nice The ambience and the service is also great Wait time is very reasonable
We visited to have tea early morning And the taste was really nice which reminds me of my granny even she make the tea with this taste
It's a pure vegetarian cafe with varieties of food cakes pastries coffee freak shakes mocktails and many more Mr Mayur Joshi (owner) maintain the quality of food on the top relished to visit here

A small place very near to SMU It’s a good place to take a break in between while traveling to Gangtok It is a veg place with some good dishes and coffees in their menu Tries their mushroom garlic bread and it was good in taste The hazelnut latte was also not bad as per the place The prices are a bit on higher side but not very expensive

Great cappuccino and extremely good Italian panini Just on the road to Gangtok They are very friendly and helpfull and have a lot of nice food and beverages you can try You should stop there on your way to Gangtok

is a must visit if you happen to pass by majhitar for those who is visiting Sikkim for the first time can stop by here for some heavenly refreshments The shakes is heavenly They make the best garlic breads and pasta too So all you foodie don’t miss out on this one
Having crossed the Teetsa river into Sikkim and regularised our Sikkim Visitors permit we enjoyed a refreshing short stop here to prepare for the drive to Gangtok
The perfect place for an evening after a hectic day of classes Awesome chocolaty shakes I find their cakes sinfully delicious
delicious punjabi food and awsome atmosphere servise is too fast i think its a single place where u get real punjabi flavour

This a small place which we visited on our way from Namchi to Gangtok The owners are a sweet couple who treated us very warmly The food was really good We didn't have time to taste non veg dishes but I am sure they will be as authentic as veg ones
Best punjabi food in majhitar its small restaurent but very clean and hygenic interior is cool

We were a group of 15 people who visited the restaurant Their service was super quick and the food was delicious Everything we ordered like aaloo prantha yellow daal chicken/egg fried rice veg biryani was amazing It's a very small place though I had ordered veg biryani and it was one of the best I've had Would love to try other dishes at the restaurant

i went to punjabi kitchen with friends on 5 March 2016 its a small restaurant but they have the best punjabi Veg & Non-veg food in town awesome Ambiance needs to be improved as it should look punjabi also
Overpriced tasteless food untrained staff and greedy owner Only good for short toilet on the way
Food was excellent but service not satisfactory
Nice to have some good pizzas on way to north Sikkim
Cozy comfortable and no nuisance well balanced place with good quality and satisfactory quantity of food
Nice food and amazing places super visit again
The food quality and taste of the food is very very poor They didn't even know the basic tastes of Punjabi sabji
